core_concept: 一個陰森的70年代兒童節目，將觀眾拉入扭曲的記憶與恐怖現實
composition_hint: 將老式電視螢幕置於前景，背景模糊的書房與扭曲的卡通角色形成對比
potential_subjects: A distorted cartoon character emerging from a flickering TV screen
A dusty record player playing eerie static
A faded poster of a 70s children's show with dark shadows
original_excerpt:
Candle Cove
is a creepypasta by
Kris Straub
of
Ichor Falls
and
Chainsawsuit
. Due to copyright issues, it can no longer be read on this wiki, but is available
at the author's website
. Please
do not
repost this story anywhere on the wiki.
Kris published Candle Cove in his anthology,
Candle Cove and Other Stories
, available
from Amazon
. The story was later adapted to form the first season of
Channel Zero
, a show based on well-known creepypastas. Also adapted were
NoEnd House
,
I'm a Search and
